LSE Communication vs UST Communication vs City Nursing --> I choose LSE>City>UST

LSE generally dim da dou win

UST once compete against professional subj...probably loss...compete against overseas uni with similar ranking on same subj..very likely in absolute disadvantage

personal and not professional opinions...dun count on me
